scripts.dev:children: npm run build:children && concurrently "npm --prefix apps/child-app-1 run preview" "npm --prefix apps/child-app-2 run preview"
scripts.build:children: npm --prefix apps/child-app-1 run build && npm --prefix apps/child-app-2 run build
scripts.build: npm --prefix apps/child-app-1 run build && npm --prefix apps/child-app-2 run build && npm --prefix apps/main-app run build
scripts.prod: npm run build && concurrently "npm --prefix apps/child-app-1 run preview" "npm --prefix apps/child-app-2 run preview" "npm --prefix apps/main-app run preview"
scripts.lint: concurrently "npm --prefix apps/child-app-1 run lint" "npm --prefix apps/child-app-2 run lint" "npm --prefix apps/main-app run lint"
scripts.lint:fix: concurrently "npm --prefix apps/child-app-1 run lint:fix" "npm --prefix apps/child-app-2 run lint:fix" "npm --prefix apps/main-app run lint:fix"
